Welcome to the NurOS Blog

AnmiTaliDev March 3, 2026

First post on our blog — introducing the project and our future plans

Welcome to the NurOS Blog!

We are excited to introduce the official blog of NurOS — an independent Linux distribution developed in Kazakhstan.

What is NurOS?

NurOS is a Linux-based operating system built from scratch. We are not based on any other distribution, which gives us full control over the system and lets us move in the right direction without unnecessary restrictions.

The name of our first release — Juldyz — means "Star" in Kazakh. It is a symbol of our aspiration to reach new heights.

Key features

  • APG package format — our own package management system
  • Modern interface — clean and intuitive
  • Active community — Telegram and GitHub

What to expect from this blog

  • Technical articles about distribution development
  • Project news and release announcements
  • Guides and tutorials for users
  • Stories from the team

Follow us on Telegram and GitHub!
